title: Vasteras Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Vasteras, with a Z-Score of -3.83. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Vasteras are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with a high heating degree day (HDD) value of 14.4 GG, indicating a high demand for heating. 
 The humidity level is at 60%, with a gentle breeze of 4.0 km/h, which may exacerbate the cold conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
